betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Steel§f

§aProduce steel — the backbone of all mid-game HBM machinery.§f

§bSteel§f is the essential alloy that unlocks the industrial age. Tougher than iron, used in almost every machine.

§6Production§f:
§b• Blast Furnace§f: iron + coal → 1 steel (ore + flux/coke yields 2–3)
§b• Crucible§f: iron + carbon for smaller batches
§b• Rotary Furnace§f: iron + coal/coke for automated production
§b• Bedrock Fragments§f: iron bedrock ore + coal/coke/flux in rotary furnace (2–4 ingots)
§b• Scrapping§f: steel deco blocks at anvil (4 blocks → 1 ingot)

§6Uses§f:
Steel plates for machine casings, bomb bodies, grenades, cells. Steel tools last 2× iron.

§eTip§f: Bulk smelt ore directly with flux or coke for best blast furnace yields.
